name: Magdalena (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the Caribbean Sea and the Magdalena River
the blood of the patriots of independence
peace and the snow-capped peaks of the Sierra Nevada

description: A blue field with three equally spaced red horizontal stripes, charged with thirty white five-pointed stars arranged in a star-shaped constellation across the centre.
history: Magdalena Department traces its origins to the Sovereign State of Magdalena of the United States of Colombia (1857-1886), and was reconstituted as a department in 1910. Its territory takes in the Caribbean coast, the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, and the lower Magdalena River basin.

features.symbolism: the blue field representing the Caribbean Sea and the Magdalena River
three equally-spaced thin red horizontal bars on the blue field
stars arranged in a stellated pattern over the field
